sb_prompt: FIND OUT WHAT KIND OF PETS THE OTHER CALLER HAS.
turns: Hi! So, do you have any pets?
I used to have a cat, but she passed away a few years ago.
Oh, I'm so sorry to hear that. Did you have any other pets besides the cat?
No, just the cat. She was my beloved companion for many years.
That's so sweet. I'm sure she will always hold a special place in your heart.
Yes, she will. Thank you for understanding.
Of course, I know how much it hurts to lose a pet. I've had to say goodbye to a few of my own furry friends over the years.
Yes, it's never easy. But I'm glad to hear that you have had pets in your life too. What kind of pets do you have now?
